title: Learn about British Columbia - Canada.ca
content:
## Learn about British Columbia
Canadians and people around the world love British Columbia (BC) for its beautiful scenery and outdoor adventures. It’s on Canada’s west coast, between the Pacific Ocean and the Rocky Mountains.
BC has a growing economy. According to the 2025 BC Labour Market Outlook, there will be more than 1 million jobs available in the province between 2025 and 2035.
You’ll find many opportunities for work and life in BC, whether you’re immigrating or just visiting for a short time.

## Settling in British Columbia
Find information to help you immigrate to and settle in BC, such as
- working in the province , including foreign credential recognition
- studying in the province , including English-language programs
- finding settlement services and programs for newcomers
- the BC Newcomers’ Guide
Learn more about settling in BC.

## Resources for French-speaking immigrants
You can find services and community support from the Relais Francophone de la Colombie-Britannique , the agency for Francophone immigrants (in French only).
